title: The Grand Quest
description: A simpler take on vanilla+ to make a better Minecraft experience.
body:
![The Grand Quest Begins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67252df1fd12d907b1599ba13e64f4e5a3718a11.png)
---
![Eye of ender recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/814f9ca7e336e8dcaa21f4607df98bb166fe1206.png)
## New Recipes!
With the eye of ender now requiring you to explore many sturctures, it will be a long time before you reach the end.  The new recipe requires a totem of undying, ender pearl, blaze powder, wind charge, echo shard, prismarine shard, and a phantom membrane! You can check out the progression mod made for this pack [Linear Progression](https://modrinth.com/datapack/linear-progression)
